# [pixi](../../pixi.md) [script](../script.md) init

Add a PEP 723 metadata block to a new or existing script

--8<-- "docs/reference/cli/pixi/script/init_extender:description"

## Usage
```
pixi script init [OPTIONS] <PATH>
```

## Arguments
- <a id="arg-<PATH>" href="#arg-<PATH>">`<PATH>`</a>
:  Script to initialize
<br>**required**: `true`

## Options
- <a id="arg---channel" href="#arg---channel">`--channel (-c) <CHANNEL>`</a>
:  Channel to use when resolving conda dependencies
<br>May be provided more than once.
